instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences and be written exclusively in English. Include the keywords "room availability," "next weekend," and "confirmation" in the email. Begin the email with the phrase "Dear Hotel Manager," and conclude with "Looking forward to your response." Tailor the email for a professional tone, ensuring it is clear and concise while avoiding overly formal or technical language. Provide a brief explanation of the purpose of the stay, such as a vacation or business trip, and request details about room types and pricing. Conclude the email with the phrase "Thanks for your help."
response: Dear Hotel Manager, I am writing to inquire about your room availability for next weekend as I plan to visit for a short business trip. Could you please provide details regarding the available room types and their corresponding pricing for those dates? Once you have checked the schedule, kindly send me a confirmation so I can finalize my travel arrangements. Please let me know if there are any special offers or packages available for guests staying during that time. Thanks for your help. Looking forward to your response.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.new_constraint: Conclude the email with the phrase "Thanks for your help."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.org_constraint: Conclude the email with "Looking forward to your response."
